results.title: Zoho Tables - Plan & Track - Apps on Google Play
results.content:
Zoho Tables is a collaborative work management tool that brings the best of a structured database in a spreadsheet like interface. Tables is built for anyone looking to organize data, manage tasks, and streamline workflows. You can manage everything from simple checklists to complex projects.  
  
BUILD WITH AI  
Build smart databases personalised to your needs, with simple text prompts using our native AI agent, ZIA.  
  
RICH DATA VISUALIZATIONS  
View your work in the way that suits you best. Use Kanban boards for setting up workflows and tracking progress, Calendar view for visualising your schedule, Gallery for viewing your records as a catalogue, or spreadsheet styled Grid for a familiar data editing interface.  
  
GET STARTED QUICKLY WITH 50+ FREE TEMPLATES [...] EVOLVE WITH EVERY UPDATE  
Turn your Android device into a powerful database-driven work hub. Add your most-used bases directly to your home screen for quick access. Use quick actions on your home screen to open recently accessed workspaces, add records to recently edited bases, or search your portal instantly. Plus, stay organized with a home screen widget that displays a list of your bases, keeping your data just a tap away.  
  
Manage your work from the palm of your hand. Download now and experience seamless work management on the go!  
Need help? Reach out to us at android-support@zohotables.com for questions and feedback. [...] COLLABORATE CONTEXTUALLY  
Share only the required data with your team members. Attach documents, and discuss with comments in real time. Whether you're at your desk or on the move, stay in sync with your team.  
  
BOOST PRODUCTIVITY  
Take voice notes on the go, scan documents with OCR, create powerful mobile knowledge systems, and get more done with less effort.  
  
AUTOMATE SIMPLY  
Automate mundane tasks easily with our no-code trigger and action logic. Focus on work that truly matters.  
  
FREE FOR PERSONAL USE  
Use Tables for free for upto 3 users and unlimited viewers. You can create as many tables as you want.   
  
EVOLVE WITH EVERY UPDATE

results.title: Zoho Tables vs. monday.com: Pros, cons, pricing, and more
results.content:
#### Poor mobile experience

Since monday work management's primary focus is its web application, users often complain that the mobile interface is clunky and lacking features that are available on the web app.

Here are some verified reviews by monday work management users on G2:

The mobile app is not the most helpful tool when needing to get information or look at a board. It feels clunky in comparison to using the web version, which can be frustrating at times when I do not have immediate access to my computer.

The mobile app experience leaves something to be desired. It can be cumbersome to move around and find what you are looking for. It can also be sluggish sometimes moving between workspaces.

## Zoho Tables vs. monday work management [...] ## Zoho Tables vs. monday work management

Zoho Tables is a spreadsheet-database hybrid that helps individuals and businesses manage work and data smartly. Users can plan and track tasks, collaborate in real time, automate workflows, and transform rigid spreadsheet data into no-code databases.

## Features of Zoho Tables

#### Intuitive interface

Zoho Tables has a spreadsheet interface. The familiarity helps in onboarding new users quickly. You can customize the tables, choose from over twenty-five data types, color-code records, and more.

#### Versatile views [...] #### Mobile-centric

Zoho Tables is designed with a mobile-first focus. The mobile app has all the same features as the web app, plus mobile-specific features such as base creation using Siri voice search, optical character recognition (OCR) to scan tabular data and transform it into bases, and the ability to uploading handwritten notes on an iPad.

Manage your work and data from anywhere.

## Zoho Tables or monday work management Which is better suited for your business?

While both tools have their strengths and drawbacks, the ideal tool boils down to your use case. monday work management is suitable for flexible workflows, collaboration, and project management for enterprises.
